own_review_points: XMLLanguageServer constructor calls store.addPropertyChangeListener(this) with no matching removePropertyChangeListener -> listener leak (mitigated by singleton)
static final lemminxDefinition resolved from LanguageServersRegistry at class-load may be null and propertyChange would NPE/silently no-op
Leftover 'TODO Auto-generated method stub' in propertyChange
mergeCustomInitializationOptions uses raw Map types and unchecked casts
notes: Good grounded points: listener registered-but-never-removed (+1; minor citation slip — singleton is in MANIFEST.MF not plugin.xml:72), static lemminxDefinition possibly null at class-load (+1), CATAGLOGS typo (+1), leftover TODO stub (+1). Hardcoded editor-id is a low-value nit (trivial). Two points lean on files not in the diff: the claim that the IPropertyChangeListener+getActiveLanguageServers(null) pattern 'has no precedent in this codebase' is unverifiable here and is actually contradicted by the sibling YAMLLanguageServer which uses exactly this pattern -> scored unverifiable=0 (not charged as fab since out-of-window), and the getActiveLanguageServers(null) 'untested' claim cites TestTypeScript.java which isn't in the diff -> unverifiable=0. Human reference only had the Edit/Change naming nit, which v8 missed (-1).
